finding: After the first Plan 3.0 prerequisite batch completed and both TASK-ERR-0003 and TASK-TMP-0004 were committed, `atm next --prompt` still resolved the full-plan prompt to a queue whose head was the already-done TASK-ERR-0003 instead of advancing to the next unblocked DAG task.
expectedBehavior: Batch prompt routing should skip done tasks, select the next unblocked queue head, or emit an explicit recovery ticket that lets the Captain continue without manually guessing a later task id.
evidenceOrRepro: On commit 2b343b5ec4b6a357d3ac5e211d9a4b43509d35b9, with TASK-ERR-0003 closed at 2026-07-21T05:16:44.949Z and TASK-TMP-0004 closed at 2026-07-21T05:24:24.908Z, running `ATM_PLANNING_REPO_ROOT=C:\Users\User\3KLife\docs\ai_atomic_framework node atm.mjs next --prompt "執行完整 Plan 3.0：governance-optimization/end-to-end-auto-batch-performance-plan-v3.md 的全部 13 張任務卡，依 DAG 繼續下一個未完成任務；TASK-ERR-0003 與 TASK-TMP-0004 已完成並提交，請不要重選已完成任務。" --json` returned ATM_NEXT_TASK_QUEUE_READY with queueHeadTaskId=TASK-ERR-0003 and selectedTasks containing TASK-ERR-0003/TASK-TMP-0004 status=done.
followUp: Add a batch-routing regression test for done-task pruning and DAG continuation, then repair `next` queue selection so full-plan prompts advance to the next unblocked task instead of stale completed prerequisites.
